name: Arch App
description: Recovery house EMR — clinical notes, medications, billing, tasks, AI assistant (Archie) for staff.

name: Chief Command Center
description: Owner-only AI command center — voice interface to Claude, agent orchestration, project dashboards, usage tracking. Phase 9 = Mac Mini convergence (formerly 'Butler').

name: Personal Assist
description: Owner's personal life-admin system + voice-first AI assistant (Jess). Tasks, expenses, Whoop, news, travel, golf. Google-only brain (Gemini 2.5 Flash Live + Pro). $150/mo cap. Kicked off 2026-04-19, Phase 0.
